zh.lifeSummary: 當Joyce Sutton於1492年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利時，她的父親Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley32歲，母親Cecily Willoughby29歲。她和Sir John Leighton至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1586年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾奧尼波利。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

en.lifeSummary: When Joyce Sutton was born in 1492, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley, was 32 and her mother, Cecily Willoughby, was 29. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Sir John Leighton. She died in 1586, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Onibury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce Sutton(이)가 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Willoughby(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Leighton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1586년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 니버이에 묻혔다.

ru.St Giles Cripplegate, London, England: ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joyce Sutton родилась в 1492 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Willoughby, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Sir John Leighton. Она умерла в 1586 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности онибури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
